name: small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual batching causes late payments and cash flow gaps. We automate the batching and delivery instead of manual batching and emailing of invoices.
problem_solved: Manual invoice batching and delivery is time-consuming and prone to errors.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Manual invoice batching and delivery is time-consuming and prone to errors.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual batching causes late payments and cash flow gaps. We automate the batching and delivery instead of manual batching and emailing of invoices.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual batching and emailing of invoices

one_liner: For small accounting firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, manual batching causes late payments and cash flow gaps. We automate the batching and delivery instead of manual batching and emailing of invoices.
